metadata.title: Zaria Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Zaria Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Zaria – Historic City of Northern Nigeria
slides.subtitle: Zaria Local Government Area is one of the oldest and most historically significant cities in northern Nigeria.

slides.title: Zaria – Center of Education and Commerce
slides.subtitle: Home to Ahmadu Bello University and major markets, Zaria remains a center of learning and trade.

paragraphs: Zaria Local Government Area is located in Kaduna State, Nigeria, and is historically known as Zazzau, one of the prominent Hausa city-states.
The city serves as a major educational center and is home to Ahmadu Bello University, one of the largest universities in Africa.
Commerce, education, agriculture, and trading activities contribute significantly to the economy of the LGA.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Zaria Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Zaria Local Government Area. Our administration is committed to improving education, infrastructure, and economic opportunities for our citizens.
Zaria remains one of the most important historical and educational centers in Kaduna State and Nigeria.
Through collaboration with community leaders, institutions, and residents, we aim to promote sustainable development and prosperity.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Farmers around Zaria cultivate maize widely for food and commercial trade.

cards.title: Millet & Sorghum
cards.subtitle: Grain Production
cards.description: Millet and sorghum are important grains grown in surrounding rural communities.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Livestock farming including cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry contributes to the local economy.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects, community programs, and government initiatives in Zaria.

footer.headquarters: Headquarters: Local Government Secretariat, Zaria, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

hero.title: About Zaria
hero.subtitle: Discover the history, culture, and economy of Zaria Local Government Area.

location: Neighboring LGAs: Sabon Gari, Soba, Igabi, and Kudan.
demographics: Major Ethnic Groups: Hausa, Fulani, and other Nigerian communities.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Education, trading, farming, and commerce.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Zaria is located in northern Kaduna State and is one of the most historically significant cities in the region.
geographyEconomy.climate: The area experiences a tropical savannah climate with rainy and dry seasons typical of northern Nigeria.
mainActivities: Education: Home to Ahmadu Bello University and other institutions.
Commerce: Large markets and trading activities across the city.
Agriculture: Farming of maize, millet, sorghum, and livestock rearing.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Reach out to Zaria Local Government for inquiries and information.

contactDetails.text: Zaria Local Government Secretariat, Zaria, Kaduna State, Nigeria

contactPage.successMessage: Thank you for contacting Zaria Local Government. We will get back to you soon.
